title: Arrays, Collections, Iterables, and Generators · Runtime Trace: Generators
summary: Transform ordered requests, unique identifiers, lookup tables, and streaming batches while preserving ownership and order. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js generators increment in a collection-processing and streaming pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use generators for lazy staged iteration while handling inputs, return, throw, and cleanup behavior.
Implement and consume iterable and iterator protocols with correct done and value transitions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
